title: Pure Cotton pot pourri - scented home botanicals - fresh floral scent - decorative home fragrance pot pourri - 180g bag
features: HOME FRAGRANCE - Experience the fresh, clean, and comforting scent of Pan Aroma Scented Potpourri Pure Cotton. Infused with essential oils, this beautifully crafted 180g blend of dried botanicals brings a crisp fragrance, perfect for adding a touch of elegance and serenity to any space.

COTTON SCENTED - Light and breezy hints of fresh cotton and airy aldehydes, evoking the sensation of clean laundry and open windows. This harmonious blend delivers a fresh yet calming atmosphere, making your home feel inviting and serene.

DECORATIVE BOTANICALS - Potpourri is composed of a variety of dried botanicals such as flowers, leaves, berries, or other natural elements. These botanicals not only contribute to the fragrance but also add visual appeal, making the potpourri a decorative element.

VERSATILE USE - You can place the potpourri in various locations, such as bowls, baskets, or decorative containers, to add fragrance to different rooms in your home. It's a versatile and easy way to enhance the atmosphere. The blend of colours and textures in the dried botanicals can complement your home decor, adding a touch of seasonal charm.
